assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md Query 3 shows: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. ready-for-qa.md confirms the same query.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md states: 'For each result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type "Depend" and fetches each linked Task's status to determine if all remediation is complete.' ready-for-qa.md describes inspecting each issue's Depend-type issuelinks and fetching statuses of TC-9021, TC-9022, TC-9024, TC-9025.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md TC-9020 section: 'ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed: TC-9021: Done (completed), TC-9022: Closed (completed)' and 'Result: INCLUDED in Ready for QA'. discovery-listing.md Ready for QA table includes TC-9020 with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md TC-9023 section: 'TC-9025: In Progress (still open -- remediation not complete)' and 'Result: EXCLUDED from Ready for QA -- TC-9025 is still In Progress. Remediation is not complete.' discovery-listing.md exclusion table: 'TC-9023 | In Progress | CVE-2026-39102 | TC-9025 still In Progress -- remediation not complete'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md TC-9026 section: 'Issue Links (Depend type): None' and 'Result: EXCLUDED from Ready for QA -- No linked remediation tasks with type "Depend". No remediation to verify.' discovery-listing.md exclusion table: 'TC-9026 | Modified | CVE-2026-39330 | No linked Tasks with type "Depend" -- no remediation to verify'.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md Ready for QA table headers: '| Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks |' with TC-9020 row showing 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in the Remediation Tasks column. ready-for-qa.md Ready for QA Table also includes the same column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md: 'TC-9020: ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed). Consider transitioning to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All remediation work is complete and ready for quality assurance verification.' and 'For TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA.'
